text:
1. Determine the time difference: Europe/Paris is UTC+1, Australia/Sydney is UTC+11, so the time difference is 11 - 1 = 10 hours.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 06:00 + 10:00 = 16:00.
3. Since the time addition doesn't cross a day boundary, the date remains November 12, 1571.
FINAL_ANSWER: 16:00 on November 12, 1571
